sys_script_include.description: Utility for sending incident lifecycle notifications
sys_script_include.name: ITSMNotificationUtils
sys_script_include.script: [/**, * ITSMNotificationUtils, * , * Description: Utility class for sending notifications related to incident lifecycle events., * Provides methods to send email notifications for incident creation, assignment,, * state changes, and escalations., * , * Usage:, * var notif = new ITSMNotificationUtils();, * notif.sendIncidentCreatedNotification(gr);, * notif.sendStateChangeNotification(gr, previousState);, */, , var ITSMNotificationUtils = Class.create();, ITSMNotificationUtils.prototype = {, initialize: function() {},, , /**, * Send notification when a new incident is created, * @param {GlideRecord} gr - The incident GlideRecord, */, sendIncidentCreatedNotification: function(gr) {, if (!gr) return;, , // Trigger the "Incident Created" event, gr.setEvent('incident.created', gr.getUniqueValue(), , 'Incident ' + gr.number + ' has been created');, , gs.info('ITSMNotificationUtils: Notification sent for new incident ' + gr.number);, },, , /**, * Send notification when an incident is assigned to a group, * @param {GlideRecord} gr - The incident GlideRecord, * @param {string} previousGroup - Previous assignment group sys_id, */, sendAssignedNotification: function(gr, previousGroup) {, if (!gr) return;, , var currentGroup = gr.getValue('assignment_group');, if (currentGroup && currentGroup !== previousGroup) {, // Trigger the "Incident Assigned" event, gr.setEvent('incident.assigned', gr.getUniqueValue(),, 'Incident ' + gr.number + ' has been assigned to ' + , gr.getDisplayValue('assignment_group'));, , gs.info('ITSMNotificationUtils: Assignment notification sent for incident ' + , gr.number);, }, },, , /**, * Send notification when incident state changes, * @param {GlideRecord} gr - The incident GlideRecord, * @param {number} previousState - Previous state value, */, sendStateChangeNotification: function(gr, previousState) {, if (!gr) return;, , var currentState = gr.getValue('state');, if (currentState !== previousState) {, var stateLabel = this.getStateLabel(currentState);, var prevLabel = this.getStateLabel(previousState);, , // Trigger the "Incident State Changed" event, gr.setEvent('incident.state_changed', gr.getUniqueValue(),, 'Incident ' + gr.number + ' state changed from "' + , prevLabel + '" to "' + stateLabel + '"');, , gs.info('ITSMNotificationUtils: State change notification sent for incident ' + , gr.number + ': ' + prevLabel + ' -> ' + stateLabel);, }, },, , /**, * Send notification when incident is escalated to L2, * @param {GlideRecord} gr - The incident GlideRecord, */, sendEscalationNotification: function(gr) {, if (!gr) return;, , // Trigger the "Incident Escalated" event, gr.setEvent('incident.escalated', gr.getUniqueValue(),, 'Incident ' + gr.number + ' has been escalated to L2 Support Team');, , gs.info('ITSMNotificationUtils: Escalation notification sent for incident ' + , gr.number);, },, , /**, * Get human-readable label for incident state value, * @param {number} state - State integer value, * @returns {string} - Human-readable state label, */, getStateLabel: function(state) {, var stateMap = {, 1: 'New',, 2: 'In Progress',, 3: 'On Hold',, 6: 'Resolved',, 7: 'Closed', };, return stateMap[state] || 'Unknown (' + state + ')';, },, , type: 'ITSMNotificationUtils', };]
